message:
feat(mermaid): gantt IR + minimal renderer (bd-30t8a)

- Add Gantt title/sections/tasks to Mermaid IR normalization.\n- Add a minimal deterministic Gantt renderer.\n- PTY harness metrics: drop brittle architecture-beta assertion; require block-beta render ok.

             members: Vec::new(),
-        annotation: None,
+            annotation: None,
         })
         .collect();
